svg.title: Case 4, hybrid team with Ronaldo as captain
svg.desc: A single 4-3-3 formation where ten of the players are U19 players in blue and one — the central attacker, wearing the captain's armband — is Ronaldo in red.
svg.text: Case 4 — Ronaldo as the captain of a U19 team
Small models do the running; the frontier model finishes
Opus / Gemini Pro on decisive calls
